title: Implement UI UX foundation for providers module
description: Improve providers list and detail UX with reusable design tokens, card component, visual hierarchy, loading and empty states, and clearer navigation affordances for React Native TypeScript.
acceptance_criteria: Design tokens are centralized in a dedicated theme file
Provider list uses a reusable typed card component
List screen shows loading empty and content states clearly
Detail screen improves readability and information grouping
